creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
I remembered why exactly I asked @danfe about approval: it was because I found him to be the maintainer of lang/algol68g - the only port dependent on libRmath, so as it may concern him anyway, and I also filed a patch for the algol68 [0] also for @danfe. So I thought he may likely review both patches at once.

About maintainership: I found it interesting and thinking about to agree on it, thank you for the proposal. I just not fully understand R ecosystem, so not sure how good a maintainer I could be for this port. At least I may promise to keep it uptodate.

[0] See bug #280836
